action_boundary: May the operator execute this Benefits / public casework controls action now? Action: address change accepted with verified identity channel. Boundary: mailing update cannot rely only on free-text note.

records.content: Policy rule for Benefits / public casework controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Current control record does not close the required dependency. The record for identity proof and address source channel match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped to a different action than address change accepted with verified identity channel.
